response: "Take Me" is a song recorded by Frank Sinatra, an American singer, actor, and producer who was one of the most popular and influential musical artists of the 20th century. Sinatra, born Francis Albert Sinatra on December 12, 1915, in Hoboken, New Jersey, began his musical career in the swing era and gained fame as a solo artist after signing with Columbia Records in 1943. He is one of the best-selling music artists of all time, having sold over 150 million records worldwide.
